text:
Author: jpaetzel
Date: Fri May 23 00:32:01 2014
New Revision: 354900
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/354900
QAT: https://qat.redports.org/buildarchive/r354900/

Log:
  Update to 1.2.13
  
  PR:	ports/189993
  Submitted by:	Bartek Rutkowski

Modified:
  head/multimedia/libdvdcss/Makefile
  head/multimedia/libdvdcss/distinfo
  head/multimedia/libdvdcss/pkg-descr
  head/multimedia/libdvdcss/pkg-plist

Modified: head/multimedia/libdvdcss/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/multimedia/libdvdcss/Makefile	Fri May 23 00:25:49 2014	(r354899)
+++ head/multimedia/libdvdcss/Makefile	Fri May 23 00:32:01 2014	(r354900)
@@ -2,8 +2,7 @@
 # $FreeBSD$
 
 PORTNAME=	libdvdcss
-PORTVERSION=	1.2.12
-PORTREVISION=	1
+PORTVERSION=	1.2.13
 CATEGORIES=	multimedia
 MASTER_SITES=	http://download.videolan.org/pub/%SUBDIR%/
 MASTER_SITE_SUBDIR=	${PORTNAME}/${PORTVERSION}

Modified: head/multimedia/libdvdcss/distinfo
==============================================================================
--- head/multimedia/libdvdcss/distinfo	Fri May 23 00:25:49 2014	(r354899)
+++ head/multimedia/libdvdcss/distinfo	Fri May 23 00:32:01 2014	(r354900)
@@ -1,2 +1,2 @@

Modified: head/multimedia/libdvdcss/pkg-descr
==============================================================================
--- head/multimedia/libdvdcss/pkg-descr	Fri May 23 00:25:49 2014	(r354899)
+++ head/multimedia/libdvdcss/pkg-descr	Fri May 23 00:32:01 2014	(r354900)
@@ -11,4 +11,4 @@ without having to bother about the decry
    - Just better. Unlike most similar projects, libdvdcss doesn't require the
      region of your drive to be set.
 
-WWW: http://www.videolan.org/libdvdcss/
+WWW: http://www.videolan.org/libdvdcss

Modified: head/multimedia/libdvdcss/pkg-plist
==============================================================================
--- head/multimedia/libdvdcss/pkg-plist	Fri May 23 00:25:49 2014	(r354899)
+++ head/multimedia/libdvdcss/pkg-plist	Fri May 23 00:32:01 2014	(r354900)

 lib/libdvdcss.so.2

 libdata/pkgconfig/libdvdcss.pc
-@dirrm include/dvdcss
